g.text: Handles native Discord UI/injector POST and WS events.
Exposes POST /api/messages/manual for direct PWA injections.
Reads multipart/form-data text uploads from Admins.
Constructs single unified massive payload context to
be passed into Gemini for block analysis.
Deduplicates by message_id and filters out
and phantom pending closed positions returned
irregularly by exchange sync endpoints before
